query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'claims' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('claimant_id', 'claim_number', 'status', 'source_document_id', 'claim_source') ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'claims' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('claimant_id', 'claim_number', 'status', 'source_document_id', 'claim_source') ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT	DATA_TYPE
claimant_id	NO	NULL	int
claim_number	NO	NULL	varchar
status	NO	submitted	enum
source_document_id	YES	NULL	int
